title: Build a Greeter CLI in JavaScript
projectGoal: A tiny command-line tool that greets people by name
description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals — functions, defaults, and command-line arguments — by building a small greeting CLI from scratch.

tools.name: Node.js
tools.why: Runs your JavaScript code and the step tests.

install.windows: Download the installer from https://nodejs.org and run it.
install.macos: Run `brew install node` or download from https://nodejs.org.
install.linux: Use your package manager, e.g. `sudo apt install nodejs npm`.
